overall_justification: The newspaper edition primarily offers factual reporting on exchange rates ('O cambio') without explicitly endorsing either the Orthodox or Expansionist view. While it notes market fluctuations and mentions specific rates for transactions, it doesn't analyze these changes within the broader context of the "Caixa de Conversão" debate or advocate for a particular conversion rate.  The mention of "moderados os embarques de café" could hint at an expansionist concern, but it's presented as a simple market observation rather than an argument for a specific policy.

supporting_evidence.quote: Embora sem letras proprias, porque tem sido moderados os embarques de café, tivemos, mais uma vez, o mercado em trabalhos de alta ainda que moderada. De facto, os preços foram melhorados para 16 5/8 bancarios e 16 11/16 d. particulares, os quaes correram inalterados para operações porém, geralmente, a prazo, até 30 do corrente.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote from the "O cambio" section exemplifies the factual reporting of exchange rate fluctuations without deeper analysis or argumentation related to the "Caixa de Conversão".
